sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to cause to go forward, to lead forward, to bring forward, drag forward
2. to incite, instigate, urge forward, set on; to induce by persuasion
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4253 and a reduplicated form of G971; to force forward, that is, bring to the front, instigate: - draw, before instruct.
